title: Agents d'entretien de locaux
exposure_rationale: This job involves physical cleaning tasks that require manual dexterity and adaptation to various environments. While some robotic tools exist, comprehensive automation is still far off.

title: Aides-soignants
exposure_rationale: This role is centered on direct patient care, requiring empathy, physical assistance, and complex human interaction. These core aspects are inherently resistant to automation.

title: Infirmiers
exposure_rationale: Nurses provide direct patient care, requiring critical thinking, empathy, and complex physical procedures. While some administrative tasks might be automated, the core care functions are not.

title: Aides à domicile
exposure_rationale: These roles involve direct physical care and human interaction, which are difficult to automate. The tasks are primarily non-digital and require empathy and physical presence.

title: Cadres administratifs et financiers
exposure_rationale: These roles involve extensive data analysis, reporting, and procedural tasks that are highly susceptible to AI automation. While strategic decision-making remains human, many operational aspects can be streamlined.

title: Professeurs du secondaire
exposure_rationale: Teaching requires complex human interaction, pedagogical adaptation, and emotional intelligence, which are difficult for AI to replicate. While administrative tasks might be automated, the core teaching function remains human.

title: Employés services publics
exposure_rationale: These roles involve significant customer interaction and administrative processing, with many routine inquiries being automatable by AI. However, complex cases and empathetic support still require human intervention.

title: Attachés commerciaux
exposure_rationale: Sales roles rely heavily on human persuasion, negotiation, and relationship building, which are difficult for AI to fully replicate. AI can support lead generation and CRM, but the core selling process remains human-driven.

title: Assistantes maternelles
exposure_rationale: This role involves direct care for children, requiring constant physical presence, emotional support, and complex, unpredictable human interaction. It is fundamentally non-digital and empathy-driven.

title: Cadres fonction publique
exposure_rationale: These roles involve strategic planning, policy development, and complex decision-making, which require human judgment and understanding of societal nuances. While administrative support can be automated, core strategic functions remain human.

title: Maîtrise des magasins
exposure_rationale: This role involves managing human teams, customer interactions, and physical store operations, requiring leadership and problem-solving skills. While AI can optimize logistics, human oversight and interpersonal skills are crucial.

title: Ouvriers magasinage manutention
exposure_rationale: These roles involve repetitive physical tasks and machinery operation in controlled environments, making them highly susceptible to automation by robotics and AI-driven logistics. Human oversight will shift to maintenance and supervision.

title: Professeurs des écoles
exposure_rationale: Teaching young children requires extensive human interaction, emotional intelligence, and adaptive pedagogical approaches that AI cannot replicate. The role is deeply rooted in human development and social learning.

title: Ingénieurs et chefs de projets IT
exposure_rationale: While these roles are highly digital, they involve complex problem-solving, creative design, and strategic project management, which AI currently augments rather than replaces. AI tools are used to enhance productivity.

title: Secrétaires bureautiques
exposure_rationale: These roles primarily involve routine administrative tasks, scheduling, and document management, which are highly susceptible to automation by AI-powered tools. The need for human intervention will significantly decrease.

title: Ouvriers emballage manutention

title: Conducteurs routiers
exposure_rationale: Autonomous driving technology is rapidly advancing, posing a significant long-term threat to this profession, especially for long-haul routes. However, human drivers are still required for complex urban deliveries, loading/unloading, and unforeseen situations.

title: Cadres B fonction publique
exposure_rationale: This role often involves administrative processes, data management, and routine decision-making, which are increasingly susceptible to AI-driven automation. However, human judgment, interpersonal skills, and adaptation to complex public sector regulations still require human intervention.

title: Agents services hospitaliers
exposure_rationale: This is a hands-on, physical role involving direct patient environment care and human interaction, which is very difficult to automate. While some cleaning tasks could be robot-assisted, the core service aspect requires human presence and empathy.

exposure_rationale: AI serves as a powerful tool for these professionals, automating data analysis, simulations, and design iterations to enhance efficiency. Nevertheless, the essential functions of innovation, complex problem-solving, and strategic direction require human ingenuity and critical thinking.

title: Techniciens services administratifs
exposure_rationale: This profession involves a high volume of data processing, document management, and routine administrative tasks, making it highly susceptible to automation by AI and RPA. title: Cadres commerciaux, marketing, achats

title: Agents administratifs
